protocol: GSP Track B pilot preregistration - QC<->#30 generic control and QC<->#20 scoped positive control
binding_rule: This pilot inherits the Track A v2 methodology. No post-hoc tuning of thresholds, null definitions, observable choice, size ranges, or verdict language is allowed after the first run script is frozen. Any such change requires a dated amendment JSON with user approval.

frozen_upgrades: geometry-killed nulls instead of cross-geometry comparisons
fixed-knot model selection at M_L instead of peak-picking
pre-registered thresholds with PASS or FAIL semantics

pilot_scope.purpose: Validate the Track A v2 Leg-4 template on one expected generic control and one expected scoped positive control before any wider QC-edge rollout.

exp10_qc_sidon_generic_control.title: QC<->#30 Sidon generic-control Leg-4 pilot

classifier_backprop_ref.notes: Sidon - proven PMF lattice-gas, geometry-dominated per #30 COLLIDER_SYNTHESIS

exp10_qc_sidon_generic_control.hypothesis: #30 Sidon is the generic negative control for the QC pilot. A fixed-knot M_L model must NOT separate the chosen Sidon observable from geometry-killed nulls strongly enough to promote the edge into the scoped bucket.

observable_selection_rule.rule: Before any run, freeze exactly one mathematical-side observable already attested in local #30 artifacts as PMF or geometry-dominated. The run script may compute only that observable for verdict purposes.
allowed_families: close-packing-density proxy from the #30 PMF/lattice-gas reading
transfer-operator or spectral proxy already used in #30 collider artifacts
another pre-existing #30 observable explicitly cited in checked-in synthesis
forbidden: inventing a new order parameter after seeing pilot data
running multiple observables and selecting the most favorable one for the final verdict

null_policy.rule: Register geometry-killed nulls that preserve coarse combinatorial bulk statistics of the chosen observable while destroying the Sidon/QC geometric structure.
required_controls: one randomization that kills the QC/Sidon geometry directly
one nuisance-parameter null that preserves bulk counts only

criteria_template.description: Reuse the Track A separation test against every registered null with the same threshold logic as the scoped template.
criteria_template.expected_for_control: FAIL on at least one null

criteria_template.description: Reuse the Track A scaling test on the frozen observable over the registered size range.
criteria_template.expected_for_control: FAIL or remain null-compatible rather than produce a scoped-only scaling law

criteria_template.description: Reuse the fixed-knot DeltaBIC discrimination test at M_L.
criteria_template.expected_for_control: FAIL or remain non-discriminating because at least one null also supports the same model

verdict_rules.GENERIC_CONTROL_CONFIRMED: At least one of C1, C2, or C3 fails, and no amendment or post-hoc observable swap occurs.
verdict_rules.SCOPED_COUNTEREXAMPLE: C1 AND C2 AND C3 all pass against all registered nulls. Halt the wider Track B rollout and audit the #30 class assignment before any atlas update.
verdict_rules.AMBIGUOUS: Implementation defect, missing observable freeze, or mixed evidence that satisfies neither rule above. No promotion and no wider rollout.

exp11_qc_sunflower_scoped_positive_contr.title: QC<->#20 sunflower scoped-positive-control Leg-4 pilot

classifier_backprop_ref.notes: Sunflower closure - SCOPED BUCKET per GSP (displacement-current cost, no geometric handle)

exp11_qc_sunflower_scoped_positive_contr.hypothesis: #20 sunflower is the scoped positive control for the QC pilot. Once the observable is frozen and matched geometry-killed nulls are registered, a fixed-knot M_L model should separate the sunflower channel from the nulls strongly enough to survive the Track A v2 criteria.

observable_selection_rule.rule: Freeze one mathematical-side observable from existing #20 artifacts before code. Preferred order is growth-rate profile g_n(m), then jamming point m*, then max family size M(n).
observable_selection_rule.registered_domain: The pilot must include the current exact data regime n in {4,5,6,7,8}. Any extension beyond that range requires an amendment.
forbidden: switching from one sunflower observable to another after seeing the first pilot result
claiming a scoped verdict from narrative interpretation alone

null_policy.rule: Register geometry-killed nulls that preserve the coarse occupancy burden of the sunflower channel while destroying core-closure geometry.
required_controls: one random family/null preserving total occupancy scale only
one local-rule null preserving low-order marginals but breaking sunflower core structure
one nuisance-parameter null matched on ambient state-space size

criteria_template.description: Positive-control observable beats each null by the Track A separation threshold over the registered range.
Positive-control observable follows the pre-registered scoped scaling behavior rather than the generic geometric class.
Fixed-knot M_L model is strongly preferred on the sunflower channel and not equally preferred on at least one null.

verdict_rules.LEG4_PASS: C1 AND C2 AND C3 pass
verdict_rules.LEG4_FAIL: Any of C1, C2, or C3 fails
verdict_rules.LEG4_AMBIGUOUS_NOT_ALLOWED: No partial or near-pass verdict is allowed under this template

pilot_rollout_gate.rule: No wider QC-edge Leg-4 campaign begins until exp10 and exp11 are both executed under this preregistration and reviewed by the user.
pilot_rollout_gate.success_condition: exp10 returns GENERIC_CONTROL_CONFIRMED and exp11 returns either LEG4_PASS or LEG4_FAIL with no post-hoc tuning.
pilot_rollout_gate.rationale: The pilot is meant to validate both sides of the reused template: a generic negative control and a scoped positive control.

post_pilot_decision.rule: After the pilot verdicts are reviewed, return to TRACK_A_RESULTS_SYNTHESIS.md item 2 and resolve the neutrino scoped-slot decision. The pilot does not itself settle that slot.

amendments.rule: Any change after commit must be recorded as TRACK_B_PREREGISTRATION_AMENDMENT_<date>.json in this directory, naming the changed field and the reason. The original file remains authoritative.
